sections.title: Abstract
sections.text: This paper studies a simple benchmark for automatic presentation generation.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.text: This work focuses on reliable local-first paper to PPT generation.

sections.title: Method
sections.text: We parse PDFs, summarize content, plan slides, and build editable PPTX files.

sections.title: Experiments
sections.text: We evaluate the pipeline with mock LLM outputs and local artifacts.

sections.title: Results
sections.text: The system produces editable slides and intermediate JSON artifacts.

pages.text:
Sample Research Paper
Alice Smith, Bob Lee
Abstract This paper studies a simple benchmark for automatic presentation generation.
1 Introduction
This work focuses on reliable local-first paper to PPT generation.
2 Method
We parse PDFs, summarize content, plan slides, and build editable PPTX files.
3 Experiments
We evaluate the pipeline with mock LLM outputs and local artifacts.
4 Results
The system produces editable slides and intermediate JSON artifacts.
References
[1] Demo Reference
